content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Array Restoration". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1023/problem/D
constraints: The sum of all elements in the array is less than or equal to 1000
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers, representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The restored array, with elements separated by spaces.

solution.approach: Use a greedy algorithm to restore the array

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(*a)
